function[T0: Semiring](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not is_semiring_congruence[T0](x0) or respects_add[T0](x0) }[S](r)
function[T0: lib(mul).Mul](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { respects_binary_op[T0](x0, T0.mul) = respects_mul[T0](x0) }[S](r)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not is_semiring_congruence[T0](x0) or respects_mul[T0](x0) }[S](r)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[A](r, A.neg)

function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[M](r, M.neg)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_binary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[M](r, M.mul)

function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { not is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) or is_module_congruence[T0, T1](x0, kernel_relation[T1, T2](x2)) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f)

goal: is_unary_congruence[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f.hom), A.neg) = (is_equivalence[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f.hom)) and respects_unary_op[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f.hom), A.neg))
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f.hom), A.neg)

goal: is_unary_congruence[G](kernel_relation[G, H](f.hom), G.inverse) = (is_equivalence[G](kernel_relation[G, H](f.hom)) and respects_unary_op[G](kernel_relation[G, H](f.hom), G.inverse))
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[G](kernel_relation[G, H](f.hom), G.inverse)

goal: is_unary_congruence[R](kernel_relation[R, S](f.hom), R.neg) = (is_equivalence[R](kernel_relation[R, S](f.hom)) and respects_unary_op[R](kernel_relation[R, S](f.hom), R.neg))
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[R](kernel_relation[R, S](f.hom), R.neg)

goal: is_unary_congruence[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), M.neg) = (is_equivalence[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f)) and respects_unary_op[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), M.neg))
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { (is_equivalence[T0](x0) and respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) }[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), M.neg)

function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { not is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) or respects_unary_op[T1](kernel_relation[T1, T2](x2), T1.neg) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f)
